commands.author: meng93
commands.command: **please do not close this pr again.** this is the 5th attempt across 4 prs, and your automated responses have created a circular trap: 1. prs #81426, #81642, #81643, #81708 — you told us: "use clawhub, not `extensions/`" 2. pr #81736 — we did exactly that (catalog entry only, zero core code), and you still said: "this is a better fit for clawhub" **but this is the clawhub path.** the catalog entry is how external clawhub plugins become discoverable in `openclaw configure`. without it, users cannot find dingtalk unless they already know the exact package name. wecom (#70562), yuanbao (#72756), and weixin (#77269) all went through this exact same path — external contributor pr adding a catalog json entry — and were merged successfully. all technical issues from your first review have been fixed: - ✅ pinned exact npm version `@0.8.20` - ✅ added `expectedintegrity` hash - ✅ fixed `docslabel` convention **i'm requesting human maintainer review.** the automated review has exhausted all available self-service paths. cc @vincentkoc @steipete — could you please take a look? this is a single-file json addition that follows the exact same format as the already-merged wecom, yuanbao, and weixin entries.
commands.freeform_prompt: **Please do not close this PR again.** This is the 5th attempt across 4 PRs, and your automated responses have created a circular trap: 1. PRs #81426, #81642, #81643, #81708 — you told us: "use ClawHub, not `extensions/`" 2. PR #81736 — we did exactly that (catalog entry only, zero core code), and you still said: "this is a better fit for ClawHub" **But this IS the ClawHub path.** The catalog entry is how external ClawHub plugins become discoverable in `openclaw configure`. Without it, users cannot find DingTalk unless they already know the exact package name. WeCom (#70562), Yuanbao (#72756), and Weixin (#77269) all went through this exact same path — external contributor PR adding a catalog JSON entry — and were merged successfully. All technical issues from your first review have been fixed: - ✅ Pinned exact npm version `@0.8.20` - ✅ Added `expectedIntegrity` hash - ✅ Fixed `docsLabel` convention **I'm requesting human maintainer review.** The automated review has exhausted all available self-service paths. cc @vincentkoc @steipete — could you please take a look? This is a single-file JSON addition that follows the exact same format as the already-merged WeCom, Yuanbao, and Weixin entries.
